schema_note: Each exercise has backward-compatible 'text' field plus structured 'components' with full/lean variants for the exercise component assembly system.

exercises.name: Safety and Ground
exercises.text: I am safe in this moment. I am supported by the earth beneath me. I am held. Even when things feel uncertain, right now, in this breath, I am safe. I can return to this knowing whenever I need it. Safety is here. Safety is now.

bridge.full: Try this before you move on. Not to fix anything. Just to give yourself a different input for a moment.
bridge.lean: Try this before you move on.

intro.full: This is Safety and Ground. You do not have to believe them yet. You do not need to believe that. Just try it.
intro.lean: This is Safety and Ground. You do not have to believe them yet.

description.full: I am safe in this moment. I am supported by the earth beneath me. I am held. Even when things feel uncertain, right now, in this breath, I am safe. I can return to this knowing whenever I need it. Safety is here. Safety is now.

integration.full: Now, before you move on, say one to yourself tonight. Nothing has to change from this moment forward. You did something just now.

exercises.name: Breath Anchor
exercises.text: My breath is my anchor. It's always here, always available. When I feel lost or overwhelmed, I can return to my breath. One breath at a time. One moment at a time. My breath reminds me that I'm alive, I'm here, I'm okay.

bridge.full: Pause here for a moment. Not to fix anything. Just to give yourself a different input for a moment.

exercises.name: Enough-ness
exercises.text: I am enough, exactly as I am. Not when I accomplish more. Not when I change. Right now. I am enough. My worth is not conditional. I don't have to earn my place here. I belong. I am enough.

bridge.full: Put the book down. Not to fix anything. Just to give yourself a different input for a moment.

exercises.name: Presence Choice
exercises.text: I choose to be present. The past is gone. The future hasn't arrived. This moment is all there is, and I choose to be here for it. Fully. Completely. I choose presence over distraction. I choose now.

bridge.full: Before you keep reading. Not to fix anything. Just to give yourself a different input for a moment.

exercises.name: Self-Compassion
exercises.text: I offer myself compassion. I'm doing the best I can with what I have. My struggles are real. My pain matters. I deserve the same kindness I'd give to someone I love. I am worthy of my own care and compassion.

exercises.name: Body Acceptance
exercises.text: I accept my body as it is. It's been with me through everything. It works for me every day, even when I criticize it. I choose to treat my body with respect and care. This body is my home. I am grateful for it.

exercises.name: Permission to Feel
exercises.text: I give myself permission to feel what I feel. My emotions are valid. I don't have to justify them or explain them away. Feeling is part of being human. I can feel without being overwhelmed. I can hold my emotions with care.

exercises.name: Strength in Vulnerability
exercises.text: Being vulnerable is not weakness. It's courage. It takes strength to be open, to be real, to be seen. I don't have to pretend I have it all together. My vulnerability connects me to others. It makes me human. I am strong enough to be vulnerable.

exercises.text: There is something sacred in me. A divine spark. A light that can't be extinguished. No matter what I've done or what's been done to me, this light remains. I am connected to something larger than myself. I am part of the sacred whole.

bridge.full: This is the practice. Not to fix anything. Just to give yourself a different input for a moment.

exercises.name: Resilience Recognition
exercises.text: I am resilient. I've survived every difficult day I've ever had. I've made it through pain, loss, heartbreak, fear. I'm still here. That's not nothing. That's everything. I am stronger than I know. I am resilient.

bridge.full: Right now. Not later. Not to fix anything. Just to give yourself a different input for a moment.

exercises.name: Creative Power
exercises.text: I have creative power. I'm creating my life with every choice I make. I'm not a passive victim of circumstance. I have agency. I have influence. I can create change. My choices matter. I am a creator.

exercises.name: Belonging
exercises.text: I belong here. On this earth. In this body. In this life. I don't have to earn my place. I don't have to prove I'm worthy of being here. I belong simply because I exist. I am part of the web of life. I belong.

exercises.name: Light Bearer
exercises.text: I bring light to the world. My presence matters. The kindness I offer, the love I give, the truth I speak, all of it creates ripples. I don't have to do grand things. Small acts of light add up. I am a light bearer.

exercises.name: Grateful Heart
exercises.text: I cultivate gratitude in my heart. Even on hard days, there are things to appreciate. My breath. The sky. Kindness. Connection. Gratitude shifts my perspective. It opens my heart. I choose to notice what's good. I choose gratitude.

exercises.name: Forgiveness
exercises.text: I forgive myself for my mistakes. I forgive myself for not knowing then what I know now. I forgive myself for being human. Forgiveness doesn't mean what I did was okay. It means I release the weight of carrying shame. I choose freedom over punishment. I forgive.

bridge.full: This one is for your body. Not to fix anything. Just to give yourself a different input for a moment.

exercises.name: Present Moment
exercises.text: I am here. Now. This is the only moment I have. I release worry about the future. I release regret about the past. Right here, right now, I am alive. I am breathing. I am present. This moment is enough. I am enough.

exercises.name: Love and Lovable
exercises.text: I am lovable. Not despite my flaws, but as a whole human being with strengths and weaknesses. I am worthy of love. I am capable of giving love. Love flows through me and to me. I am love. I am lovable. I am loved.

exercises.name: Integration and Wholeness
exercises.text: I am whole. Not broken. Not incomplete. Whole. All my parts, even the difficult ones, belong. I don't have to reject any part of myself. I can integrate it all. The light and the shadow. The strength and the vulnerability. I am whole. I have always been whole.
